title: November 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 23''' is the 327th day of the year (328th in leap years), with 38 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1900s#1909|1909]] - [[Marcus Powell]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Bruce Vilanch]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Carl Gafford]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Lateef Crowder]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 23|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 23]] published
*[[1985]] – "[[Across the Roon Sea]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[Blue Harvest]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on ABC.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 127|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 127]] published.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: The Original Soundtrack Anthology]]'' released.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' published.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars Animated Adventures: Ewoks]]'' released on DVD.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars Animated Adventures: Droids]]'' released on DVD.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Insider 79|''Star Wars Insider'' 79]] released to subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 3]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars Omnibus: At War with the Empire Volume 2|''Omnibus: At War with the Empire Volume 2'']] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Han Solo 5|''Han Solo'' 5]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars (2015) 25|''Star Wars'' (2015) 25]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 25|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 25]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters (TPB)|''Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Hyperspace Stories 3|''Hyperspace Stories'' 3]] published.
*2022 – [[Revelations (2022) 1|''Revelations'' (2022) 1]] published.
*2022 – [[Yoda 1|''Yoda'' 1]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Tales from the Rancor Pit]]'' published in comic stores.
*2022 – "[[Rix Road (episode)|Rix Road]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
<noinclude>
